title: PTDT v32 Evidence Manifest
description: Canonical schema for the PTDT v32 Evidence Manifest, providing cryptographic chain of custody for engineering and governance decisions.

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence manifest.

timestamp.description: RFC 3161 compliant timestamp of manifest generation.

provenance.description: Provenance details tracking solver versions and their SBOMs.

solvers.description: List of solvers and versions used in this execution.

container_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the solver container image.

sbom_ref.description: URI to the Syft-generated SBOM for this solver.

mesh_metadata.description: Metadata regarding the computational mesh used.

execution_results.description: Results and convergence metrics for the execution.

uncertainty_bounds.description: Confidence intervals/uncertainty fields derived from EnKF.

cryptographic_signatures.description: Digital signatures ensuring immutability and non-repudiation.

signer_identity.description: Identity of the signing authority (e.g., OIDC subject, public key fingerprint).

timestamp_authority_token.description: RFC 3161 Time-Stamp Token (TST) provided by a trusted TSA.
